title: Visit — corner of Maple and Third

blocks.headline: Find us on the corner of Maple and Third.
blocks.subheadline: Look for the green awning and the chalkboard. Two blocks from the public library, across from the bike shop.

blocks.alt: Cafe interior with hanging pendant lights, golden hour

left.heading: Hours
left.text:
Tuesday — Friday · 7am to 4pm
Saturday — Sunday · 7am to 5pm
Monday · closed (we're roasting)

The last pour-over goes out fifteen minutes before close. The kitchen stops by 3pm on weekdays.

right.heading: Address
right.text:
412 Maple Street
on the corner of Third

Two blocks from the public library. Free street parking after 6pm. Bike racks out front. The 14 bus stops half a block away.

blocks.heading: Book the back table.
blocks.description: We hold the back table (seats six) for groups by request. Birthdays, book clubs, the occasional tasting. Fill this in and we'll get back to you within a day.

blocks.text: (This is an example site. The form is not connected to a backend — clicking Send won't actually email anyone.)

blocks.quote: The corner table by the window at Roastery is the best seat in the city. I have written most of two books at it.
blocks.author: Eli Park
